messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

/Users/anvaybarhate/AuditAI/frontend/src/components/layout/DashboardLayout.tsx:44:5
  42 |   // Close mobile menu on route change
  43 |   useEffect(() => {
> 44 |     setIsMobileMenuOpen(false);
     |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect
  45 |   }, [location.pathname]);
  46 |
  47 |   const navigation = [

import React, { useState } from 'react' import { motion } from 'framer-motion' import { ShieldCheck, Mail, Lock, Eye, EyeOff, ArrowRight, Loader2, FileSearch, BarChart3, BrainCircuit, } from 'lucide-react' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input' import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label' import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle, } from '@/components/ui/card' import { cn } from '@/lib/utils' /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Animation helpers */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ const fadeUp = { hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, visible: (i: number) => ({ opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { delay: i * 0.1, type: 'spring' as const, bounce: 0.3, duration: 1.2 }, }), } const staggerContainer = { hidden: {}, visible: { transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } }, } /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Feature pills shown on the left panel */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ const features = [ { icon: FileSearch, title: 'Instant Document Parsing', desc: 'Upload PDFs, CSVs & Excel — structured data in seconds.', }, { icon: BarChart3, title: 'Real-Time Violation Detection', desc: 'Cross-check every transaction against GST and other regulatory rules.', }, { icon: BrainCircuit, title: 'Actionable AI Insights', desc: 'Human-readable explanations and priority-ranked fix recommendations.', }, ] /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ /* Main export */ /* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */ export function LoginForm() { const [email, setEmail] = useState('') const [password, setPassword] = useState('') const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false) const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false) const [error, setError] = useState(null) const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault() setError(null) setIsLoading(true) // --- Replace with your real auth call via src/services/api.ts --- try { await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 1500)) // simulate network // e.g. const res = await api.post('/auth/login', { email, password }) window.location.href = '/dashboard' } catch { setError('Invalid email or password. Please try again.') } finally { setIsLoading(false) } } return (
{/* ---- Decorative background blobs ---- */}
{/* ===== LEFT PANEL — branding & features (hidden on mobile) ===== */} {/* Top: logo */} AuditAI {/* Middle: feature list */}
{features.map((f, i) => (

{f.title}

{f.desc}

 ))}
{/* Bottom: testimonial / social proof */} "AuditAI cut our quarterly compliance review from 3 weeks to under 2 hours. The violation dashboard alone paid for itself."
— CFO, Fortune 500 FinTech
{/* Decorative gradient line */}
{/* ===== RIGHT PANEL — login card ===== */}
{/* Mobile-only logo */}
AuditAI
Welcome back Sign in to your account to continue auditing
{/* ---- Email ---- */}
setEmail(e.target.value)} required autoComplete="email" />
{/* ---- Password ---- */}
Forgot password?
setPassword(e.target.value)} required autoComplete="current-password" />
{/* ---- Error message ---- */} {error && ( {error} )} {/* ---- Submit ---- */}
{/* ---- Divider ---- */}
or continue with
{/* ---- Social login buttons ---- */}

Don't have an account?{' '} Create one

By signing in, you agree to our{' '} Terms of Service {' '} and{' '} Privacy Policy .

) }

source:
import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import { LayoutDashboard, FileText, Settings, Bell, User } from "lucide-react"; import { ShinyButton } from "@/components/ui/shiny-button"; import { MenuBar } from "@/components/ui/glow-menu"; const menuItems = [ { icon: LayoutDashboard, label: "Dashboard", href: "#", gradient: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(59,130,246,0.15) 0%, rgba(37,99,235,0.06) 50%, rgba(29,78,216,0) 100%)", iconColor: "text-blue-500", }, { icon: FileText, label: "Reports", href: "#", gradient: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(168,85,247,0.15) 0%, rgba(147,51,234,0.06) 50%, rgba(126,34,206,0) 100%)", iconColor: "text-purple-500", }, { icon: Bell, label: "Alerts", href: "#", gradient: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(249,115,22,0.15) 0%, rgba(234,88,12,0.06) 50%, rgba(194,65,12,0) 100%)", iconColor: "text-orange-500", }, { icon: User, label: "Account", href: "#", gradient: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(239,68,68,0.15) 0%, rgba(220,38,38,0.06) 50%, rgba(185,28,28,0) 100%)", iconColor: "text-red-500", }, ]; const features = [ ["Autonomous ", "Financial Integrity"], ["Multi-Agent ", "AI Pipeline"], ["Real-time ", "Violation Detection"], ["Zero-Latency ", "Scanning"], ["Intelligent ", "Compliance Protocol"] ]; const TypewriterText = () => { const [typedLength, setTypedLength] = useState(0); const [featureIndex, setFeatureIndex] = useState(0); const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { let timeout: ReturnType; const currentFeature = features[featureIndex]; const fullTextLength = currentFeature[0].length + currentFeature[1].length; if (isDeleting) { if (typedLength > 0) { timeout = setTimeout(() => setTypedLength((prev) => prev - 1), 20); } else { setIsDeleting(false); setFeatureIndex((prev) => (prev + 1) % features.length); } } else { if (typedLength < fullTextLength) { timeout = setTimeout(() => setTypedLength((prev) => prev + 1), 50); } else { timeout = setTimeout(() => setIsDeleting(true), 2500); } } return () => clearTimeout(timeout); }, [typedLength, isDeleting, featureIndex]); const currentFeature = features[featureIndex]; const prefixLength = currentFeature[0].length; const typedPrefix = currentFeature[0].slice(0, typedLength); const typedHighlight = typedLength > prefixLength ? currentFeature[1].slice(0, typedLength - prefixLength) : ""; const untypedPrefix = typedLength < prefixLength ? currentFeature[0].slice(typedLength) : ""; const untypedHighlight = typedLength > prefixLength ? currentFeature[1].slice(typedLength - prefixLength) : currentFeature[1]; return (

{typedPrefix} {typedHighlight} {untypedPrefix} {untypedHighlight}

); }; export default function Home() { const [activeItem, setActiveItem] = useState("Dashboard"); const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
{/* TopNavBar */}
AuditAI
navigate('/login')}> New Audit
{/* Hero Section */}
Intelligent Compliance Protocol 2.4

Eliminate manual errors and regulatory risks. AuditAI leverages a multi-agent neural pipeline to process compliance at machine speed.

navigate('/login')}> Initialize System Audit navigate('/pipeline')}> View Live Pipeline
{/* Hero Insight Badge */}
warning

MSME Risk Advisory

Manual audits are expensive, slow, and error-prone. Avoid the ₹10,000+ per violation penalty risk with real-time detection.

{/* Multi-Agent AI Pipeline (Bento Grid) */}

Multi-Agent AI Pipeline

{/* Agent 1: Document Parsing */}
description
data_object

Document Parsing Agent

Neural OCR and computer vision layers extract high-fidelity data from unstructured receipts, invoices, and bank statements with 99.9% accuracy.

Processing Rate

420 Docs/Min

Confidence Score

High Accuracy

{/* Agent 2: Transaction Extraction */}
account_balance_wallet

Transaction Extraction

Automatic categorization of cash flows into ledger-ready entities, grouping by merchant, tax code, and department.

ORGANIZING FLOWS...

{/* Agent 3: Compliance Validator */}
gavel

Compliance Validator

Cross-checking every entry against the latest GST/Regulatory mandates. Detecting anomalies in tax computation before they hit the portal.

GST Rule #42a VERIFIED
TDS Compliance VERIFIED
{/* Agent 4: Explanation Agent */}
chat_bubble_outline

Explanation Agent

format_quote "The discrepancy in the Q3 ledger is due to an unlinked Input Tax Credit from Invoice #8821. I recommend immediate reconciliation to prevent a ₹15,000 fine."

Insight Delivery

Natural Language Audit Report Generated

{/* Financial Health Score Section */}

Real-time Violation Detection

Our platform monitors your financial health 24/7. Don't wait for year-end reviews to find errors. Detect and resolve compliance drift as it happens.

  • check_circle

    Zero-Latency Scanning

    Continuous monitoring of all inbound and outbound transactions.

  • check_circle

    Drift Analysis

    AI identifies pattern shifts that suggest potential audit triggers.

{/* Trust Gauge Component */}

Health Score

85

Optimal Status

GST Mismatch in Vendor #A92

{/* Statistics Section */}

90%

Cost Reduction

10x

Audit Speed

Human Error

12k+

MSMEs Secured

{/* Footer / CTA */}

Secure your Financial Future today.

Stop risking penalties and wasting manpower on manual compliance logs. Experience the power of the Luminal Auditor.
